name: What if I already talked to Perplexity support about my content?

mainEntity.name: What if I already talked to Perplexity support about my content?

acceptedAnswer.description: Their responses may admit use or create estoppel; save all communications.[2] Doesn't waive rights, unlike publishers' ignored pleas.[3] Key factors: No settlement implied. Use in suit for willfulness. Avoid further talks sans lawyer. Strengthens case.
